name: @code-journal/server
description: code-journal reference server — receives reports & uploaded sessions, serves the browse UI

scripts.test: tsup src/index.ts test/server.test.ts test/extras.test.ts test/display-name.test.ts --format cjs --out-dir test-dist --silent && node --test test-dist/test/server.test.js test-dist/test/extras.test.js test-dist/test/display-name.test.js
